Notice And Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings And Attorney Fees
Off Calendar Jun-26-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA), N.A. Motion for Judgment on the Pleadings and Attorney Fees. Appearances: Zoe Taleporos, Defendant in Pro Per appearing and opposing party. Defendant failed to give notice, pursuant to San Francisco Local Rule 8.3. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Granted. No opposition filed. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) (302/CWW)Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard; Court Reporter: Kent Gubbine CSR 5797
